'''Drama Korr''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] and a wealthy [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] merchant. She was [[Death/Legends|assassinated]] by the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Durge/Legends|Durge]] in her [[Drama Korr's space yacht|yacht]] while on a business run on the [[Karthakk system]]. Her murder was arranged by [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] on behalf of [[Xist]], her business rival.

==Biography==
Drama Korr was a wealthy [[Human/Legends|Human]] woman from [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] who lived during the final years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], renowned for her refined taste, business acumen, and indulgent lifestyle. As one of Corellia's most prominent industrial financiers, she amassed a vast fortune through shipping and luxury trade ventures, often competing with other magnates across the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]]. Among her fiercest rivals was the influential entrepreneur [[Xist]], whose dealings in military contracts and illicit ventures frequently clashed with her own.<ref name="Obsession 1"/>

In [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], as the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] raged across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], Korr sought a period of rest and leisure on the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] resort world of [[Maramere]], traveling aboard her lavish personal space yacht with a small entourage of attendants and guards. However, as her ship exited [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] near the system, it was suddenly ambushed by the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Durge/Legends|Durge]], who obliterated her vessel in a merciless attack. Unknown to the Republic at the time, Korr's death had been orchestrated in secret by [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] himself, acting on behalf of Xist, who had grown weary of her interference in his trade operations. The assassination served as both a personal favor and a political move, removing a wealthy Corellian whose influence might have complicated the Separatist's economic interests. Drama Korr and her entire crew perished in the assault, their destruction quietly buried under the chaos of the war, leaving her rival's empire to flourish unchecked.<ref name="Obsession 2"/>
